title: MenuX
description: Make custom menus with custom shop features and more!
body:
MenuX Plugin Description MenuX is a powerful and flexible menu creation plugin for Minecraft servers that allows server administrators to create custom, interactive GUI menus with minimal effort. With MenuX, you can design visually appealing menus with animated elements, custom sounds, and various click actions to enhance your players' experience. Key Features: Easy Configuration: Simple YAML-based menu creation Interactive Elements: Support for different click actions (left, right, shift, etc.) Animated Items: Create dynamic, eye-catching menus that change over time Sound Effects: Add audio feedback for opening menus and clicking items Command Integration: Execute commands as players or from the console Create shops easily, make checks for cash / points / custom currency, to give u the item Menu Linking: Connect multiple menus together for advanced navigation Permission Control: Restrict access to specific menus Short Commands: Create custom command aliases for quick menu access
Advertisement:
